title: Goodness And Greatness.
content:
Only two virtues exist. Oh, would they were ever united!
    Ever the good with the great, ever the great with the good!
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Friedrich Schiller delivers a powerful performance in "Goodness And Greatness."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
